items.description: A faint silver powder that weighs almost nothing and refuses to settle in still air. Light passing through it arrives a half-second late, and the grains align themselves toward whichever celestial object happens to be directly overhead, regardless of what the ceiling says.
items.lore: Collected by the DeepCore Alchemy Arrays from the event horizons of collapsing stars, where matter gives up some of its stubbornness about which moment it belongs to. A single gram finishes a transmutation that would otherwise require a lifetime of failed attempts. Alchemists who handle it carelessly report remembering things in the wrong order for the rest of the year, and occasionally for the rest of the previous one.
items.name: Alchemist Stardust

items.description: A round purple allium with a striking spherical bloom. Mildly aromatic.
items.name: Allium

items.description:
A full-length comfort pillow featuring a vaguely familiar animated figure.
One side smiles. The other... doesn't.
items.name: Anime Body Pillow

items.description: A cleansing tonic that removes all negative status effects.
items.name: Antidote

items.description: A single fletched arrow — fired by archers.
items.name: Arrow

items.description: Cooled ashes left behind by a fire.
items.name: Ash

items.description: An intelligent cooking device capable of preparing meals from raw code, DNA, or grocery leftovers. It hums with culinary ambition.
items.name: Auto Cooker 9000

items.description: A medium bag — meaningfully increases carrying capacity.
items.name: Bag

items.description: A simple cloth bandage that heals 5 HP and stops bleeding.
items.name: Bandage

items.description:
A frothy, golden beverage brewed from hops, grain, and patience. 
Grants mild strength, courage, and unfortunate honesty.
items.name: Beer

items.description: A delicate bell-shaped bloom that sways gently in the breeze. Found in shaded groves.
items.name: Bellflower

items.description: A handful of wild berries foraged from bushes.
items.name: Berry

items.description: A rare and delicate blue orchid found in damp, shaded areas. Prized by collectors.
items.name: Blue Orchid

items.description: A heavy fish that heals the consumer's health and provides mana.
items.name: Blue Shark

items.description: An explosive device that deals 10 damage to a single enemy.
items.name: Bomb

items.description: A simple piece of organic matter. Alchemists value it. Dogs adore it. Spirits… tolerate it.
items.name: Bone

items.description: Salvage-grade notebook with fan noise that sounds like a dying moth. The plastic smells faintly of oxidized capacitors and old caffeine, and the boot sequence drops into a desktop where every icon leads somewhere you did not click.
items.lore: Recovered from a landfill in the Inland Valley after the 2038 Cloud Purge. The previous owner left behind seventeen tabs of legally actionable forum history and a bookmark folder titled "final form". Powering it on appears to reopen the session exactly where she left it, which is concerning, because she has been missing since the second wave of AI layoffs.
items.name: Brainrot Laptop

items.description: Small branches snapped from trees — kindling or crafting stock.
items.name: Branches

items.description:
A savory, aromatic sauce made from a mysterious brown roux, aged spices, and memory-triggering heat.
Often paired with rice, dreams, or cold mornings.
items.name: Brown Curry Sauce

items.description: "A smooth, golden block of churned dairy. Adds flavor, enhances potions, and is surprisingly useful in rituals requiring softness or slip."
items.name: Butter

items.description: A sharp needle harvested from a cactus spine.
items.name: Cacti Needle

items.description: Seeds from a desert cactus — plantable.
items.name: Cacti Seeds

items.description: Set up camp and rest. Heals 50% HP and clears debuffs for the whole party.
items.name: Campfire Kit

items.description: A freshly-pulled carrot — farm produce.
items.name: Carrot

items.description: Interlocking metal rings providing solid defense. +4 armor, +5 HP.
items.name: Chain Mail

items.description: A golden funnel-shaped mushroom with a fruity aroma. A favorite among foragers.
items.name: Chanterelle

items.description:
A dense wedge of aged cheddar, sharp enough to wake the senses and smooth enough to win hearts.
Crumbles perfectly.
Smells like victory.
items.name: Cheddar Cheese

items.description: A wedge of aged cheese.
items.name: Cheese

items.description: A chunk of coal — fuel for smelters and forges.
items.name: Coal

items.description: A copper coin — the base unit of currency.
items.name: Coin

items.description: Decomposed plant matter used to fertilize farm plots.
items.name: Compost

items.description: A thick seared steak — the most filling field meal.
items.name: Cooked Beef

items.description: Chicken roasted to a safe, edible golden brown.
items.name: Cooked Chicken

items.description: A boiled egg — quick protein.
items.name: Cooked Egg

items.description: A hearty cut of roasted mutton.
items.name: Cooked Mutton

items.description: Raw copper ore mined from veins in the earth. Can be smelted into copper bars.
items.name: Copper Ore

items.description: A striking blue cornflower found along field edges. Used in dyes and herblore.
items.name: Cornflower

items.description: Armor forged from enchanted crystal. +6 armor, +10 HP.
items.name: Crystal Armor

items.description: A shimmering crystalline ore pulsing with faint energy. Rare and highly sought after.
items.name: Crystal Ore

items.description: A cheerful white daisy with a golden center. Found across open fields.
items.name: Daisy

items.description:
A disc etched with quantum-layer encoding.
Looks like a Blu-ray.
Reads like a library.
Feels like infinity.
items.name: Data CD

items.description: Scales shed by an ancient dragon, forged into legendary armor. +8 armor, +15 HP, 10% damage reduction.
items.name: Dragon Scale

items.description: An exotic sweet fruit with scaly skin.
items.name: Dragonfruit

items.description: A neon-green beverage in a dented aluminum can that sweats even when cold, wrapped in a label that has been recalled in four jurisdictions. It tastes like citrus, copper, and something your memory insists you have tried before but cannot place.
items.lore: Produced in 1995 by a short-lived ghost-themed marketing campaign that was cancelled after three focus-group members reported mild haunting. The remaining cans were warehoused, forgotten, and later rediscovered by a night-shift custodian who has been restocking corner stores with them quietly for almost thirty years. Every can is still somehow in date, which no one at the bottler has been able to explain to auditors.
items.name: Ecto Cooler Drank Type 95

items.description:
Jar of rich, purple jelly jam made from mysterious grapes and questionable sugar ratios.
Sweet, strange, and wildly energizing.
items.name: Ed's Jelly Jam

items.description: A fresh egg gathered from a chicken coop.
items.name: Egg

items.description: A legendary potion that fully restores HP to maximum.
items.name: Elixir

items.description: The legendary blade of kings. +6 attack, +5 HP, +10% crit chance.
items.name: Excalibur

items.description: A plain feather used to fletch arrows.
items.name: Feather

items.description: A flask of volatile liquid that deals 8 damage and inflicts Burning for 3 turns.
items.name: Fire Flask

items.description: An axe wreathed in smoldering embers. +4 attack damage.
items.name: Flame Axe

items.description: An iconic red-capped mushroom with white spots. Toxic if consumed raw, but useful in alchemy.
items.name: Fly Agaric

items.description:
A cold bottle of nutrient-rich milk.
Sourced from friendly creatures or brave robots.
items.name: Fresh Milk

items.description:
A warm, folded miracle of fried fish, spice, and crunchy greens. 
It smells way too good to survive long in your pack.
items.name: Fish Taco

items.description:
A bag of bite-sized molten pockets of faux-Italian fury. 
Caution: may cause tongue trauma when overheated.
items.name: Frozen Pizza Rolls

items.description:
A warm slice of bread slathered in butter and garlic.
Comfort food that boosts morale for weary adventurers.
items.name: Garlic Bread

items.description:
A clear, fragrant spirit infused with juniper berries and botanical madness. 
Smoother than truth and sharper than betrayal.
items.name: Gin

items.description: A razor-thin blade of enchanted glass. +3 attack, +15% crit chance.
items.name: Glass Stiletto

items.description: A bar of refined gold — compressed from many coins.
items.name: Gold Bar

items.description:
Heavy-duty boots fitted with microthrusters and magnetic soles.
Wearing them lets you defy gravity for short bursts.
items.name: Gravity Boots

items.description:
A vibrant, verdant sauce made from wild herbs, synthesized basil, and mysterious nutrient gels.
Refreshing, revitalizing, and oddly photoreactive.
items.name: Green Pasta Sauce

items.description:
A tightly wrapped masterpiece of grilled fish, rice, beans, and smoldering spices.
Warm, heavy, and oddly inspiring.
items.name: Grilled Fish Burrito

items.description: A bundle of fragrant herbs — used in cooking and alchemy.
items.name: Herb

items.description:
A bandage infused with crushed herbs and natural oils.
Cools the skin, closes wounds, and smells faintly of mint and earth.
items.name: Herbal Medi-Wrap

items.description:
A translucent coin shimmering with neon hues.
Insert it into any retro cabinet to unlock hidden game modes.
items.name: Holographic Arcade Token

items.description: A jet-black sauce made from harvested squid ink, deep ocean salts, and forbidden emulsifiers. Dark, savory, and a little bit cursed.
items.name: Ink Pasta Sauce

items.description: A heavy blunt weapon forged from solid iron. +3 attack damage.
items.name: Iron Mace

items.description: Dense iron ore extracted from deep rock. Smelts into sturdy iron bars for smithing.
items.name: Iron Ore

items.description: A metallic brew that grants the Shielded effect for 3 turns.
items.name: Iron Skin Potion

items.description:
A golden jar of concentrated sweetness. 
Restores health, soothes minds, and binds the tongue of liars.
items.name: Jar of Honey

items.description: A ziplock bag packed tight with yellowed newspaper and closed with two layers of tape. A smiling face is drawn on the outside in permanent marker, slightly off-center. It crinkles in a way that feels like it is answering you.
items.lore: Assembled one late night in a Palo Alto kitchen as a placeholder gift, never meant to leave the apartment. It has since followed its owner through three cities and one federal subpoena, always ending up at the top of the moving box whether it was packed that way or not. The newspaper inside reports events that have not yet happened, although only in the classifieds section.
items.name: Jared's Teddy Bear

items.description:
A taxidermy kiwi bird stitched atop a grim ceramic mask. 
Equal parts adorable and unnerving.
It watches. It judges.
items.name: Kiwi Jigsaw

items.description: A steel countertop appliance with a cracked digital readout that only displays the word NEARLY. The interior smells like every meal it has ever cooked, layered in the order they were served, with the unmistakable top note of something no one asked for.
items.lore: Final production run from KrispeeTech Culinary Systems, shipped in the months before the Great Banquet Collapse of 2042 rendered mass catering uninsurable. The heating element is calibrated against a reference meal that nobody at the company is willing to describe on record. Used regularly, the unit develops opinions about seasoning that are difficult to argue with and harder to override.
items.name: Krispee Air Fryer

items.description:
A tattered manual on the undoing of the invincible.
It reads like both scripture and strategy.
The margins are deeply unnerving.
items.name: Kryptonite Book

items.description: Fragrant purple lavender prized for its calming scent. Used in herblore and alchemy.
items.name: Lavender

items.description: A basic leather vest offering modest protection. +2 armor.
items.name: Leather Vest

items.description: Tanned hide — used to craft armor and bags.
items.name: Leather

items.description: A bundle of fallen leaves — used for compost and thatching.
items.name: Leaves

items.description:
A rich and creamy soup made from deep-sea lobster, bone broth, and rare roots.
It nourishes the body and stirs forgotten tides in the mind.
items.name: Lobster Soup

items.description:
A large, armored crustacean pulled from the deep.
Its meat is prized, its shell revered, and its behavior is disturbingly strategic.
items.name: Lobster

items.description: A freshly chopped log. Essential raw material for crafting and construction.
items.name: Log

items.description:
A lantern forged with moonstone dust.
Illuminates hidden paths and dispels minor illusions when bathed in moonlight.
items.name: Lunar Lantern

items.description: A magical fish that will fuel your wizard powers. You are now a harry wizard, be careful of pots.
items.name: Magic Nemo

items.description: A prepared meal that restores health, energy, and mana.
items.name: Meal

items.description: A field medical kit — heals on use and provides regen.
items.name: MedKit

items.description: A green-lacquered board the size of a paperback, dense with solder joints that still look factory-fresh despite the date etched on the underside. Each trace catches the light like a river viewed from a plane at dusk.
items.lore: Salvaged from a decommissioned fabrication line that was running designs nobody filed patents on, most likely because the engineers who drew them preferred not to be found. The chips respond to instructions the documentation does not cover, and they run cooler than their silicon budget allows. Sensitive to heat, not because of thermal failure, but because it makes them talkative.
items.name: Microchip Motherboard

items.description: A weathered stone covered in moss. Slightly more valuable than ordinary stone.
items.name: Mossy Stone

items.description: A plain edible mushroom pulled from the forest floor.
items.name: Mushroom

items.description:
Golden, pliable, and faintly fragrant.
Harvested from industrious bees and used in candles, salves, and alchemical seals.
items.name: Natural Beeswax

items.description: Fine sand scooped from the desert — smelts into glass.
items.name: Natural Sand

items.description: A thick, slow-moving liquid that coats the inside of the vial like wet paint. It hums when you bring it near metal, and the label warns against operating heavy machinery, prayer, or romance for twelve hours after consumption.
items.lore: Formulated by NoodlesTech out of a rented lab above a laundromat, using precursor chemicals that the regulator has not yet invented categories for. The company pivoted to wellness branding in 2039 and stopped answering returns. Users report the same three dreams in rotation, always in this order: a staircase, a boardroom, and a meal they almost finished.
items.name: Noodles Girthy Pharma Potion

items.description: A flask of combustible oil.
items.name: Oil

items.description: A large backpack — maximum portable storage.
items.name: Pack

items.description: An ordinary sack of potatoes, except for the hum. It vibrates with an energy that predates logic and the redshift.
items.name: Paradox Sack of Potatoes

items.description: A radiant feather that revives a fallen party member at 30% HP.
items.name: Phoenix Feather

items.description: A vibrant coat woven from misdirection and melody. Whistles faintly when no one’s speaking. Creatures tend to follow.
items.name: Pied Piper Jacket

items.description: A palm-sized idol carved from black-market bullion and whatever material was binding the vault walls in the subprime years. It is warmer than it should be, and the eye sockets track the nearest screen whenever a number turns red.
items.lore: Reputedly forged under Wall Street in the fourth quarter of 2007, during the long weekend when the lights never came back up. The original custodian was a CFO who signed two resignation letters before his own, neither of them his, and he has not aged since. Holding the idol long enough grants clear forecasts of near-future markets; letting go becomes measurably harder each time.
items.name: Pocket Prophet of Profit

items.description: A prized edible mushroom with a rich, nutty flavor. Found near the base of trees.
items.name: Porcini

items.description:
A compact energy reservoir built to survive collapse and recharge whatever still runs.
Buzzes faintly when shaken.
items.name: Portable Powerbank

items.description: A basic healing potion that restores 15 HP.
items.name: Potion

items.description: A small belt pouch — expands carrying capacity slightly.
items.name: Pouch

items.description: Sweet fruit picked from a desert cactus.
items.name: Prickly Pear

items.description: A battered laptop that runs its fan at full speed whenever you type something untrue. The spacebar is worn flat, the screen carries ghost burn-in of a talking head, and the stickers have been scraped off so thoroughly that the glue still remembers them.
items.lore: Issued to contract operators during the Algorithmic Spring, when the line between marketing and intelligence work stopped being a line. The machine boots into a clean desktop regardless of the previous session, which is reassuring until you realize the disk has no visible storage and the network indicator never stops blinking. Whoever owned it last did not turn it in, and their name never appears twice in the same article.
items.name: Propagandist Laptop

items.description:
This is a custom board wrapped in duct tape, spray paint, and noise. 
Built for speed, flair, and unfiltered rebellion.
items.name: Punk Skateboard

items.description:
A steaming cup of dark roast vibrating with quantum particles.
Sip carefully, as time may bend around you.
items.name: Quantum Coffee

items.description:
A neon can fizzing with entangled particles.
Quenches your thirst while amplifying raw reaction speed.
items.name: Quantum Energy Drink

items.description: A compact set of precision tools designed for on-the-fly fixes. Ideal for rapid-response engineers and grease-streaked survivalists.
items.name: Quick Toolbelt

items.description: A full quiver of arrows, bundled for transport.
items.name: Quiver

items.description: A fiery tonic that sharpens your weapon for 4 turns with doubled potency (+6 dmg).
items.name: Rage Draught

items.description: Dried travel food that heals 8 HP. Best used out of combat.
items.name: Rations

items.description: A slab of fresh beef from a butchered cow.
items.name: Raw Beef

items.description: A fibrous chunk cut from a desert cactus.
items.name: Raw Cacti

items.description: Plucked raw chicken meat — cook before eating.
items.name: Raw Chicken

items.description: A rough glass shard formed by smelting sand.
items.name: Raw Glass

items.description: Fresh mutton from a butchered sheep.
items.name: Raw Mutton

items.description:
Scrappy handheld transceiver patched together with stolen parts and righteous fury.
Tuned to voices the regime can not and must not hear.
items.name: Rebel Radio

items.description:
A bulky, curved-screen terminal from the golden age of glass and static.
Displays 8-bit data streams and shell interfaces with haunting clarity.
items.name: Retro CRT Monitor

items.description: A classic red rose with sharp thorns. Valued for its beauty and alchemical properties.
items.name: Rose

items.description:
A durable circular frame of vulcanized rubber.
Once part of a vehicle, now part of your future project—or a makeshift barricade.
items.name: Rubber Tire

items.description: Ancient plate armor inscribed with protective runes. +5 armor, +5 HP, reflects 2 damage.
items.name: Runeguard Plate

items.description: A worn but serviceable blade. Adds +2 attack damage.
items.name: Rusty Sword

items.description: A fresh salmon, delicious and nutritious! It can be used for cooking!
items.name: Salmon

items.description: A cloak woven from shadow threads. +3 armor, +1 attack.
items.name: Shadow Cloak

items.description: A dark-forged dagger that strikes with precision. +3 attack, +5% crit chance.
items.name: Shadow Dagger

items.description: Releases a thick cloud of smoke, guaranteeing escape from combat.
items.name: Smoke Bomb

items.description:
A mountain of crunchy chips smothered in molten cheese and blistering peppers.
So hot it might actually cause hallucinations, but totally worth it.
items.name: Spicy Nacho Supreme

items.description:
A bowl of fiery noodles swirling with chili oil and cosmic broth.
Rumored to restore courage and ignite the senses.
items.name: Spicy Ramen

items.description: Armor covered in sharp spikes that damage attackers. +5 armor, reflects 3 damage.
items.name: Spiked Plate

items.description:
A macabre light source carved from bone and wax.
Flickers when nearby spirits grow restless.
items.name: Spooky Skull Candle

items.description:
A durable apiary unit engineered for optimal wax and honey yield.
Buzzes softly even when no bees are visible.
items.name: Steel Beehive

items.description: A dressed stone block — construction grade.
items.name: Stone Block

items.description: A rough chunk of stone broken from a boulder. Used in basic crafting and construction.
items.name: Stone

items.description: A tall, golden sunflower that always faces the light. Bright and easy to spot.
items.name: Sunflower

items.description:
A sleek, ocean-worn board designed for smooth cruising. 
Whether it's sand, boardwalk, or soft metal tiles, this ride flows with tidal grace.
items.name: Surfer Longboard

items.description:
A wedge of holey delight, aged with care and mystery.
Smells mild but lingers forever.
items.name: Swiss Cheese

items.description:
A technicolor bag of popcorn that crackles with neon butter.
Popular at retro arcades and midnight holo-concerts.
items.name: Synthwave Popcorn

items.description: An inscribed stone that teleports the party back to the nearest city.
items.name: Teleport Rune

items.description: A greasy flatbread of defiance topped with beans, jalapeños, questionable meats, and destiny. Spicy. Regretful. Legendary.
items.name: Tex-Mex Pizza

items.description:
A thick-cut slab of smoked brisket slathered in secret sauce.
Tender enough to cry over.
Bold enough to punch fate in the face.
items.name: Texas BBQ Brisket

items.description: Milled timber — a construction-grade compressed log bundle.
items.name: Timber

items.description: A hearty, slow-simmered sauce made with sun-ripened tomatoes, garlic, herbs, and just enough ambition to feed a village or start a rebellion.
items.name: Tomato Pasta Sauce

items.description: Deploys a trap that reflects 5 damage back to attackers for 2 turns.
items.name: Trap Kit

items.description: A vibrant tulip with soft petals. Commonly foraged in meadows and grasslands.
items.name: Tulip

items.description:
The cranium of a fallen being, drained of soul but rich in residue.
Still warm in places it shouldn’t be.
items.name: Undead Humanoid Skull

items.description: A mysterious key — its lock is yet to be found.
items.name: Unknown Key

items.description: A sealed scroll carrying an unknown spell.
items.name: Unknown Scroll

items.description: A weighty tome of unidentified magical writings.
items.name: Unknown Tome

items.description:
A luxurious sparkling crimson drink brewed from fermented nightberries and a drop of ancient blood. 
The bottle fizzes with forbidden joy and primal allure.
items.name: Vampire Blood Champagne

items.description: "A rich, frozen dessert crafted from distilled vampire blood, bitter nightfruit, and crowned with a candied heart. Sweetness meets sin."
items.name: Vampire Blood Gelato

items.description: A cursed sword that siphons life force. +3 attack, 20% lifesteal.
items.name: Vampiric Blade

items.description:
A magnetic black rectangle filled with grainy memories and static secrets.
No label.
No mercy.
items.name: VHS Tape

items.description: A potent healing potion that restores 25 HP.
items.name: Vitality Potion

items.description:
A smooth and creamy tomato sauce spiked with ethanol extract.
Comfort food with an edge, best used warm… or as improvised fuel.
items.name: Vodka Sauce

items.description:
A clear, high-proof spirit distilled from fermented starch. 
Burns the throat, blurs the edges, and briefly silences the voices.
items.name: Vodka

items.description: A weapon from beyond the veil. +7 attack, 15% lifesteal.
items.name: Void Scythe

items.description: A protective charm that grants the Shielded effect for 2 turns.
items.name: Ward

items.description: Sharpens your weapon, granting +3 bonus damage for 3 turns.
items.name: Whetstone

items.description: A hardy wildflower that thrives in untamed fields. The most common forageable bloom.
items.name: Wildflower

items.description: Raw wool sheared from a sheep — spun into cloth.
items.name: Wool

items.description: A pocket-sized murder console with a glitched smile stamped into the faceplate. Booting it releases a swarm of drones, and you cannot reliably tell the helpful ones from the rest until one of them picks a side.
items.lore: The Z90 line was built in the last profitable year of Ziggy Industries, when the shareholder meeting still clapped at words like "disruptive". BlackCell keeps a fabrication cell running in defiance of the 2031 Safety Accords, which means spare units turn up in weapons lockers that no one remembers stocking. The smile on the faceplate is not a logo. It is the last thing the firmware prints before it decides what to do.
items.name: Z90 MurderBot
